entries.reason: Single Responsibility — The draft focuses on one concern: excluding autogenerated files from `flow run review` diff input.; Unambiguous Requirements — It specifies concrete paths and a specific execution path (`fallback`) rather than vague quality terms.; Complete Context — Several items are decisions/scope notes without explicit “When/If … shall …” requirement phrasing.; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or other secrets are present.; Prioritize Requirements — There are more than three requirement-like items, but no explicit priority ordering is given.; Impact on Existing Features — It states impact boundaries by noting only fallback changes and no change to spec file-path route.; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Recommendations are present, but explicit basis (docs/guardrails/code patterns) is not consistently stated for each Q&A item.; Explore Before Asking — Inapplicable; the draft already records decisions and does not defer answerable questions to the user.; Proactively Raise Related Implications — It proactively addresses overwrite behavior and separates token-reduction work into another issue.; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — Inapplicable; no critique is being made, and the draft is explicitly user-approved.; Capture Digressions in draft.md — A digression is referenced (separate issue), but there is no explicit capture note in `draft.md`.; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — It includes implementation-level details (specific file/function and argument behavior).; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — Inapplicable; no command/option removal or semantic CLI change is proposed.

Single Responsibility — The draft focuses on one concern: excluding auto-generated files from `flow run review` diff input.; Unambiguous Requirements — Requirements use explicit paths and verifiable `When ... shall ...` conditions.; Complete Context — Each listed requirement includes both a trigger condition and expected behavior.; No Hardcoded Secrets — No secrets (keys/passwords/tokens) are present; this guardrail is inapplicable to the draft text.; Prioritize Requirements — More than three requirements are prioritized with `P1` and `P2`.; Impact on Existing Features — The draft explicitly states affected and unaffected paths (`fallback` changed, `spec Scope` and `gate` unaffected).; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Each Q includes a recommended answer and cites a basis category.; Explore Before Asking — The draft resolves questions directly via code-pattern rationale instead of deferring to user questions.; Proactively Raise Related Implications — It proactively notes adjacent impacts (gate path) and separates an out-of-scope optimization.; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — No critique of user ideas is performed, so this is inapplicable.; Capture Digressions in draft.md — Digression is explicitly documented under `脱線の記録` in the draft.; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — It includes implementation-level detail (e.g., adding paths directly to `git diff` arguments and test script placement).; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — No existing command/option removal or semantic change is proposed, so migration planning is inapplicable.

Single Responsibility — 仕様は「`flow run review` のdiff除外」に集中しており、無関係な変更はスコープ外として分離されている。; Unambiguous Requirements — 各要件は対象経路・除外パス・期待結果が具体的で検証可能。; Complete Context — R1〜R3はいずれも `When` 条件と `shall` の期待動作が対になっている。; No Hardcoded Secrets — 本文は要件ドラフトであり、APIキー等の秘密情報は含まれていない。; Prioritize Requirements — 要件は3件で「3件超」の条件に該当せず、加えてP1/P2で優先度も明示されている。; Impact on Existing Features — 既存機能への影響範囲と非影響範囲（spec Scope経路・gate経路）が明示されている。; Present Recommendations with Reasoning — Q4の根拠が指定された根拠分類（docs/・ガードレール原則・既存コードパターン）に明確に沿っていない。; Explore Before Asking — ユーザーへの未解決質問を残さず、Q&Aは既存情報前提で回答済み。; Proactively Raise Related Implications — fallback経路限定適用やgate非影響など、関連影響を先回りして記載している。; Confirm Brainstorm vs. Decision Before Critiquing — 本文は承認済みドラフト提示であり、ブレスト案への批評行為は含まれない。; Capture Digressions in draft.md — 脱線した改善案をスコープ外として明示し、別ボードへ分離した記録がある。; Draft Stays at Requirements Level — 「reviewコマンド内に直接定義する」など実装方針レベルの記述が含まれている。; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — 既存コマンド/オプションの削除や意味変更はなく、移行計画要件は実質的に非該当。

Single Responsibility — The spec targets one concern: excluding `docs/` from review.; Unambiguous Requirements — No concrete, verifiable requirements are defined.; Complete Context — There are no When/If + shall requirement statements.; No Hardcoded Secrets — No source code or embedded credentials are present in this content.; No Silent Error Swallowing — No error-handling code is specified, so this article is inapplicable here.; Prioritize Requirements — The requirements list is empty, so priority ordering is not yet applicable.; Impact on Existing Features — The spec does not state impacts or explicitly say none are affected.; Bounded Resource Usage — No recursion, retry, or bulk-loading design is described in this draft.; Changes Require Test Coverage — No tests are listed and no reason for missing tests is provided.; Spec Includes Test Strategy — The spec contains no test strategy section content.; Synthesize Draft, Do Not Copy — The document remains an unfilled template rather than a synthesized spec.; Record Unresolved Points as Open Questions — Open questions are placeholders without concrete unresolved points.; Include 'Why This Approach' Rationale — No rationale for the chosen approach is provided.; Backward — Compatible CLI Interface — No CLI command/option removal or semantic change is described.; Exit Code Contract — No command failure behavior is specified, so this article is inapplicable in this draft.

R1 docs/ 配下を全体diffから除外 — fallback経路で `git diff <base> -- . :!docs/` を使う実装になっているため。; R2 README.md を全体diffから除外 — fallback経路の除外パスに `:!README.md` が追加されているため。; R3 AGENTS.md を全体diffから除外 — fallback経路の除外パスに `:!AGENTS.md` が追加されているため。; R4 .sdd — forge/output/ 配下を全体diffから除外 — fallback経路の除外パスに `:!.sdd-forge/output/` が追加されているため。; R5 spec Scope の個別ファイルdiffは既存動作維持 — `filePath` 指定時は従来どおり `["--", filePath]` を使い除外パスを適用していないため。; R6 除外対象のみ変更時は空diff扱い — 除外後に `git diff` 出力が空なら結果配列に追加されず、結合結果が空文字になる実装のため。; No Hardcoded Secrets — No API keys, passwords, tokens, or similar secrets appear in the spec or diff.; No Silent Error Swallowing — `runGit(...)` failures are effectively ignored (`if (committed.ok ...)` / `if (staged.ok ...)`) with no log or re-throw.; Bounded Resource Usage — No recursion, retry loop, or bulk-load pattern is introduced; only a fixed exclude-path list is added.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — No logging of credentials or PII is shown in the provided content.; No Disabling Existing Tests — No test skipping, commenting out, or deletion is present.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — Inapplicable: no new tests are added and no breakage scenario is shown.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — No existing test files are modified in the provided diff.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — Inapplicable: no existing test deprecation/obsolescence is identified in the provided content.; Exit Code Contract — If `git diff` fails, current logic can still proceed with empty output, risking success behavior without surfacing failure.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — No synchronous file I/O in loops or bulk paths is introduced by this change.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — Inapplicable: this diff does not add new CLI/stdin inputs or alter entry-point parsing.
gate-impl flagged pre-existing silent error swallowing in collectCommittedAndStagedDiff (runGit failure silently ignored)
entries.resolution: added stderr warning on git diff failure to satisfy guardrail without changing behavior

entries.reason: R1 docs/ 配下を fallback 全体 diff から除外 — `filePath` 未指定時に `:!docs/` を `git diff` 引数へ追加しているため。; R2 README.md を fallback 全体 diff から除外 — `REVIEW_EXCLUDE_PATHS` に `README.md` が含まれ、全体 diff の pathspec 除外に適用されるため。; R3 AGENTS.md を fallback 全体 diff から除外 — `REVIEW_EXCLUDE_PATHS` に `AGENTS.md` が含まれ、全体 diff の pathspec 除外に適用されるため。; R4 .sdd — forge/output/ 配下を fallback 全体 diff から除外 — `REVIEW_EXCLUDE_PATHS` に `.sdd-forge/output/` が含まれ、全体 diff の pathspec 除外に適用されるため。; R5 spec Scope の個別ファイル diff では除外を適用しない — `filePath` 指定時は `["--", filePath]` のみを使い、除外 pathspec を付与しないため。; R6 除外対象だけ変更時は空 diff として扱う — 全体 diff で除外 pathspec を使うため該当変更は出力されず、結果が空文字列になりうる実装になっているため。; No Hardcoded Secrets — Added constants are only file paths; no keys, tokens, or credentials are present.; No Silent Error Swallowing — `git diff` failures are explicitly logged to stderr with warning messages.; Bounded Resource Usage — This change adds fixed exclude-path arguments and introduces no recursion, retry loop, or bulk loader.; No Sensitive Data in Logs — New logs report git command failure context/stderr only; no passwords, tokens, or PII are introduced.; No Disabling Existing Tests — No test files are skipped, removed, or commented out in the provided diff.; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — No new tests are introduced here, so this guardrail is inapplicable.; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — No existing test code is modified or deleted.; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — The change is limited to diff target filtering and does not inherently invalidate existing tests.; Exit Code Contract — `git diff` failures are only warned and processing continues, which can allow failure paths without a non-zero exit.; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — No synchronous file I/O is added in loops or bulk-processing paths.; Validate User Input at Entry Point — This patch does not add new CLI/stdin entry handling; input-validation surface is unchanged.

Exclude `docs/` from fallback whole — repo diff — Fallback pathspec now adds `:!docs/`, so `docs/` changes are omitted.; Exclude `README.md` from fallback whole — repo diff — Fallback pathspec explicitly adds `:!README.md`.; Exclude `AGENTS.md` from fallback whole — repo diff — Fallback pathspec explicitly adds `:!AGENTS.md`.; Exclude `.sdd — forge/output/` from fallback whole-repo diff — Fallback pathspec explicitly adds `:!.sdd-forge/output/`.; Keep spec — scope file diff behavior unchanged — When `filePath` is provided, code uses `["--", filePath]` and does not apply exclude paths.; Treat diff as empty when only excluded files changed — With only excluded paths changed, both git diff outputs are empty and the function returns no diff content.; No Hardcoded Secrets — 追加・変更コードに API キーやパスワード等のハードコードはない。; No Silent Error Swallowing — `git diff` 失敗時に警告ログを出し、両方失敗時は `throw` している。; Bounded Resource Usage — 再帰・リトライ・無制限バルク処理は含まれず、この変更には該当しない。; No Sensitive Data in Logs — ログ出力は `git diff` エラー情報のみで、機密値の直接出力は確認できない。; No Disabling Existing Tests — テストの skip・削除・コメントアウト変更は含まれていない。; Escalate When New Tests Break Existing Tests — 新規テスト追加や既存テスト破壊に関する変更がなく本件では非該当。; Do Not Modify Existing Tests Without Approval — 既存テストの変更自体がない。; Flag Tests That Become Irrelevant — テスト仕様を無効化・陳腐化させる変更は示されておらず非該当。; Exit Code Contract — `committed` または `staged` の片方だけ失敗しても処理継続し得るため、失敗を非ゼロ終了で必ず通知する契約を満たさない。; No Synchronous I/O in Hot Paths — `readFileSync` 等の同期 I/O をループ/バルク経路に導入していない。; Validate User Input at Entry Point — この差分は入力受け取り経路を変更しておらず本条項は非該当。
